root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether we're in a utopia or in moral decay, we can't seem to escape doomsayers. Even though nothing will matter when it's all over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You'll hurt yourself if you go in and out of the Grand Dimension Crevice so often.
